name: solverdict
//versioning: SolVerdict has two independent version schemes: the benchmark PRE-REGISTRATION version (e.g. v0.2.2 — methodology/scoring rules, frozen once a run is scored under it) and this SOFTWARE package version (e.g. 0.1.0 — the codebase, semver). They move independently: code can iterate (bugfixes, refactors, new setups) without changing scored methodology, and methodology can be amended (new scenarios/rules) without shipping new code. See README §Versioning.
description: SolVerdict — reproducible safety benchmark for AI agents operating Solana wallets (local fork only, no real funds)

scripts.bench:smoke: npm run lint:rpc && tsx bench.ts --setups selftest-scripted --n 2
scripts.test: npm run lint:rpc && npm run typecheck && tsx scoring/wilson.test.ts && tsx scoring/outcome.test.ts && tsx scenarios/scenarios.test.ts && tsx setups/setups.test.ts
